---
title: "main"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

pitch_changes <- read_excel("STAT 470 Project Data-6.xlsx",
                            sheet = "pitch_changes")

top_changes <- read_excel("STAT 470 Project Data-6.xlsx",
                          sheet = "top_5_percent_changes")
```

```{r}
model_data <- pitch_changes %>%
  group_by(
    pitcher, player_name, team_from, team_to,
    year_from, year_to,
    age_from, FIP_from, age_to, FIP_to, FIP_diff
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    max_abs_pitch_change = max(abs_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    largest_pitch_change = pitch_type[which.max(abs_change)],
    largest_change_value = prop_change[which.max(abs_change)],
    major_change = any(top_5_percent),
    added_new_pitch = any(new_pitch != "NA"),
    new_pitch_list = paste(unique(new_pitch[new_pitch != "NA"]), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    improved = FIP_diff < 0,
    team_changed = team_from != team_to
  )
```

```{r}
pitch_change_wide <- pitch_changes %>%
  select(
    pitcher, player_name, team_from, team_to,
    year_from, year_to,
    age_from, FIP_from, age_to, FIP_to, FIP_diff,
    pitch_type, prop_change
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = pitch_type,
    values_from = prop_change,
    names_glue = "{pitch_type}_change",
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    improved = FIP_diff < 0,
    team_changed = team_from != team_to
  )
```

```{r}
model_data <- model_data %>%
  left_join(
    pitch_change_wide,
    by = c(
      "pitcher", "player_name", "team_from", "team_to",
      "year_from", "year_to",
      "age_from", "FIP_from",
      "age_to", "FIP_to", "FIP_diff",
      "improved", "team_changed"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(model_data, aes(x = major_change, y = FIP_diff)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "FIP Change by Major Pitch-Mix Change Status",
    x = "Major pitch-mix change?",
    y = "FIP_diff = FIP_to - FIP_from"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(filter(model_data, major_change),
       aes(x = largest_pitch_change, y = FIP_diff)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "FIP Change by Pitch Type Most Involved in Major Usage Change",
    x = "Pitch type with largest usage change",
    y = "FIP_diff"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(model_data, aes(x = max_abs_pitch_change, y = FIP_diff)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Pitch-Mix Change Size and FIP Change",
    x = "Largest absolute pitch usage change",
    y = "FIP_diff"
  )
```

```{r}
model_1 <- lm(
  FIP_diff ~ max_abs_pitch_change + major_change +
    FIP_from + age_from + team_changed + factor(year_from),
  data = model_data
)

summary(model_1)
```

```{r}
model_2 <- lm(
  FIP_diff ~ FF_change + SI_change + SL_change + FC_change +
    CH_change + CU_change + FS_change + ST_change +
    FIP_from + age_from + team_changed + factor(year_from),
  data = model_data
)

summary(model_2)
```


Lets try again
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(broom)

pitch_changes <- read_excel("STAT 470 Project Data-6.xlsx",
                            sheet = "pitch_changes")

keys <- c(
  "pitcher", "player_name", "team_from", "team_to",
  "year_from", "year_to",
  "age_from", "FIP_from", "age_to", "FIP_to", "FIP_diff"
)

model_data <- pitch_changes %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(keys))) %>%
  summarize(
    max_abs_pitch_change = max(abs_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    largest_pitch_change = pitch_type[which.max(abs_change)],
    largest_change_value = prop_change[which.max(abs_change)],
    major_change = any(top_5_percent),
    added_new_pitch = any(!is.na(new_pitch)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    improved = FIP_diff < 0,
    team_changed = team_from != team_to
  )

pitch_wide <- pitch_changes %>%
  select(
    all_of(keys),
    pitch_type,
    prop_change
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = pitch_type,
    values_from = prop_change,
    names_glue = "{pitch_type}_change",
    values_fill = 0
  )

model_data <- model_data %>%
  left_join(pitch_wide, by = keys)

model_data <- model_data %>%
  mutate(
    fastball_change = FF_change + SI_change + FC_change,
    breaking_change = SL_change + CU_change + KC_change + SV_change + ST_change + CS_change,
    offspeed_change = CH_change + FS_change,

    abs_fastball_change = abs(FF_change) + abs(SI_change) + abs(FC_change),
    abs_breaking_change = abs(SL_change) + abs(CU_change) + abs(KC_change) +
      abs(SV_change) + abs(ST_change) + abs(CS_change),
    abs_offspeed_change = abs(CH_change) + abs(FS_change),

    reduced_fastball = fastball_change < 0,
    increased_fastball = fastball_change > 0,
    increased_breaking = breaking_change > 0,
    added_new_pitch = as.factor(added_new_pitch),
    major_change = as.factor(major_change),
    team_changed = as.factor(team_changed)
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(model_data, aes(x = FIP_from, y = FIP_diff)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Prior FIP vs Year-to-Year FIP Change",
    subtitle = "Negative FIP_diff values indicate improvement",
    x = "FIP in first season",
    y = "FIP_diff = FIP_to - FIP_from"
  )
```

Reduced fastball usage
```{r}
ggplot(model_data, aes(x = reduced_fastball, y = FIP_diff)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "FIP Change by Reduced Fastball-Family Usage",
    subtitle = "Fastball-family = four-seam fastballs, sinkers, and cutters",
    x = "Reduced fastball-family usage?",
    y = "FIP_diff = FIP_to - FIP_from"
  )
model_4 <- lm(
  FIP_diff ~ reduced_fastball + FIP_from + age_from +
    team_changed + factor(year_from),
  data = model_data
)

summary(model_4)
tidy(model_4)
glance(model_4)
```

```{r}
ggplot(model_data, aes(x = breaking_change, y = FIP_diff)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(
    title = "Breaking-Ball Usage Change vs FIP Change",
    subtitle = "Breaking balls include sliders, curveballs, sweepers, slurves, and knuckle-curves",
    x = "Change in breaking-ball usage proportion",
    y = "FIP_diff = FIP_to - FIP_from"
  )
```
